headline: The Trump phone is not a serious phone
summary: The Trump phone was never considered serious due to its incoherent specs and dodgy renders. Trump Mobile admitted the phone wouldn't be US-made shortly after its announcement. The article dismisses the device as fundamentally unserious from the start.

headline: I’m filling in at The Verge for 6 weeks. Ask me anything!
summary: Technology reporter David, cohost of the Waveform Podcast, is filling in at The Verge for six weeks. He is taking over for senior reviewer Allison Johnson. David will host a subscriber-only 'Ask Me Anything' session today.

headline: Empathy for the optimizers
summary: This article is from 'Optimizer,' a newsletter by Victoria Song exploring life-changing gadgets and health products. It features Bryan Johnson, known for his quest to live forever, who suffers from an incurable autoimmune disease. The piece likely delves into the realities and paradoxes of biohacking.

headline: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
summary: Instagram head Adam Mosseri states the platform shouldn't filter out AI content. He believes users who dislike AI should control their own feeds. Mosseri made these remarks during an interview on Lenny Rachitsky's podcast.

headline: 'Additional Packs Are Entirely Optional': Ubisoft Responds to Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Microtransactions Backlash, as $60 Game Arrives With $85 of DLC
summary: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced faces backlash over its in-game microtransactions. The $60 game launched with additional packs totaling $85, sparking player outrage. Ubisoft responded by stating these 'additional packs are entirely optional.'

headline: 'This Is a Deeply Odd State of Affairs' — Tech Experts Slam Activision's 'Low Effort' Call of Duty: Black Ops PS5 Port
summary: Activision's Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 ports for PS4/PS5 are drawing heavy criticism. Tech experts are slamming them as 'low effort' due to disappointing graphics performance. The ports also raised eyebrows over their high price point.

headline: Pokémon TCG: Pitch Black Booster Bundle Preorders Are Back in Stock, and Under Market Price
summary: Pokémon TCG: Pitch Black Sealed Booster Bundle preorders are now back in stock on Amazon. Although not at MSRP, they are listed significantly below market price. This offers a rare opportunity compared to resale sites like TCGplayer and eBay.

headline: 'I Just Can't Believe My Luck' — Dark Souls Superfan Peter Serafinowicz Reveals How He Landed a Role in the Upcoming Elden Ring Movie
summary: Actor Peter Serafinowicz, a self-proclaimed Dark Souls superfan, has landed a role in the upcoming Elden Ring movie. He secured the part through a chance encounter with fellow fan Alex Garland. Serafinowicz expressed immense gratitude and surprise at his good fortune.

headline: Bayeux Tapestry arrives in UK for first time in 900 years under police guard
summary: The historic Bayeux Tapestry has arrived in the UK for the first time in 900 years. The famous artifact, depicting the Norman Conquest, traveled under heavy police guard. It is set to go on public display in September.

headline: Met police investigating Reform over election donations - reports
summary: The Metropolitan Police are reportedly investigating Reform UK regarding election donations. The probe focuses on donations made by the mother of convicted fraudster George Cottrell. Reports suggest the investigation is ongoing.

headline: Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
summary: Passengers on a Ryanair-owned Malta Air flight reported a man was nearly sucked out of a window mid-air. The incident caused significant alarm among those on board. Ryanair confirmed a passenger received medical treatment following the event.

headline: Pioneering treatment saves identical twins from rare pregnancy condition
summary: Identical twins Nancy and Margo were saved by a pioneering medical treatment. The procedure was administered while the twins were still in the womb. This breakthrough was part of a world-first medical trial addressing a rare pregnancy condition.
